节点.功能描述: When no other types are explicitly specified, this type will be matched.
When no other types are explicitly specified, this type will be matched.

Set font feature, advanced text styles and effects as designed by the font author. The format is the like the CSS font-feature-settings attribute. normal | <feature-tag-value>, where <feature-tag-value> = <string> [ <integer> | on | off ], like: "ss01" 0 the values of <feature-tag-value> reference to doc of RichEditor component number of <feature-tag-value> can be single or multiple, and separated by comma ','.
Defines the leading margin placeholder of a paragraph.
The position of the text span.
The content of the text span.
Defines the richEditor Image Layout Style.
